table_description: Subscription records — plan, MRR, seats, and lifecycle. A customer can have multiple subscriptions over time (e.g., upgrade creates a new row).
use_cases: Calculate current MRR (sum of mrr WHERE status = 'active')
Track plan distribution and revenue mix
Identify churned subscriptions and cancellation reasons
Analyze billing cycle preferences (monthly vs annual)
data_quality_notes: ended_at is NULL for active subscriptions — filter with ended_at IS NULL or status = 'active'
A customer can have multiple subscription rows (upgrade/downgrade creates new + closes old)
cancellation_reason is NULL unless status is 'cancelled'
mrr includes per-seat pricing variance — not always exact plan base price

table_columns.name: plan
table_columns.description: Plan tier: starter, professional, business, enterprise

table_columns.name: ended_at
table_columns.description: Subscription end timestamp — NULL if active

table_columns.name: status
table_columns.description: Lifecycle status: active, cancelled, upgraded, downgraded

table_columns.name: cancellation_reason
table_columns.description: Reason for cancellation — NULL unless cancelled
